# Launch Screen Assets

The three PNG files in this directory are transparent fallback launch images.
The visible launch-screen layout is configured in
`ios/Runner/Base.lproj/LaunchScreen.storyboard`.

To customize it in Xcode, open `ios/Runner.xcodeproj`, select
`Runner/Assets.xcassets` in the Project navigator, and replace the launch-image
assets while preserving their scale assignments in `Contents.json`.
